utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes entries for all 7. Now check if each is fully specified per requirements: (1) destination: clearly specified (Prague, Czech Republic) – complete. (2) travel_dates: specific dates given (Oct 15–19, 2024) – complete. (3) transportation: flight details with costs – provided with route, round-trip, price, and a booking reference (though airline/times not specified, the format only asks for flight details with costs; this seems sufficient). (4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs – hotel name, nights, rate, total, and booking reference – complete. (5) activities: selected activities with costs – list of three activities each with cost and booking reference – complete. (6) additional_services: any extra services with costs – here it only says “Vegan restaurant recommendations with mixed dining budget approach” without specific services or costs; lacks cost details, so not fully specified. (7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown – includes flights, accommodation, activities, dining budget, total cost, remaining buffer, budget limit – appears complete. Therefore, 6 out of 7 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to map each item from the final package to the exact corresponding item name in the ground-truth ratings and return its numeric rating.
